content.en:
Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man was a little surprised when he learned about Ye Tian's achievements.

"The Endless Lord is really amazing, he has actually created a top-notch eternal technique, Shaking Mountain, you are much worse than him now!" said the white-bearded old man.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain on the side smiled and said: "Master, my talent is average, and I can be promoted to such an achievement today, it is all the credit of the master, the talent of the Endless Lord is indeed very demonic, I am afraid that it is the first in this era, and I am naturally not comparable to him." "

The white-bearded old man asked again, "How long will it take you to break through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain replied: "Master, although I have comprehended the Ancient Desolate Monument of Time and Space, my comprehension is limited, and it will take a long time to completely control the space. "

"Next, your doppelganger should go out and walk around more, maybe there is some understanding, or chance. The white-bearded old man suggested.

"Yes, master. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountains replied.

......

There is no holy place.

During this time, many Legendary Realm Lords came to visit him, and even 08 even the Ice River Lord came.

And Ye Tian also received them one by one, after all, the more Legendary Realm lords he knew, there were only benefits, and there was no harm.

After another period of time, the Legendary Realm Lords who came to visit him gradually became rarer.

At this time, he began to announce the retreat.

The purpose of this retreat is mainly to refine the Upper Eternal Treasure, which is far more than the Intermediate Eternal Treasure, and it takes a certain amount of time to refine it.

Ye Tian placed this statue-like Superior Eternal Treasure in the inner world and began to slowly refine it, constantly invading its internal origin.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian gradually refined this high-ranking eternal treasure and also knew its name

Ancient Statue!

The Statue of the Ancient Shadow is a high-ranking eternal treasure that can be integrated into the body for battle, it can greatly increase the strength of the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and it can also transfer some of the injuries to the Statue of the Ancient Circle, so as to avoid being injured by the enemy.

After the battle, the statue will slowly repair itself.

"This Superior Eternal Treasure is good!

Ye Tian was surprised.

With this Superior Eternal Treasure, his strength could be increased by at least several times.

After another long period of time, Ye Tian completely refined the Upper Eternal Treasure Ancient Statue.

At this time, Ye Tiancai really knew the true value of the Gu Xia Statue, or the value of the Eternal Treasure of the upper rank.

The Gu Xia Statue perfectly presents the fusion of several Daos, similar to the Eternal Technique.

If you comprehend the ancient statue, it will help to create a similar top-notch supreme technique.

"The Lord of the Word has given up the competition for the Upper Rank Eternal Treasure, if she gets this Upper Rank Eternal Treasure, not only can her strength be improved, but she will also be able to create the top supreme technique of the Sect faster. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, the Lord of the Word of Darkness must also want to obtain a high-ranking eternal treasure, but he was the first to find it.

If it were him, he would be embarrassed to fight.

"Then let's rely on the Gu Xia statue and create a top supreme skill, so that the strength can be improved. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, the key task of Ye Tian's replica body is to comprehend the ancient statue and create a similar top-notch supreme technique.

And just like that, one eternal epoch after another passed.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to practice creation, and with the assistance of the ancient statue, he controlled more and more Dao, and finally created a very good top-notch supreme technique on this day.

This time, the top supreme technique created by Ye Tian was biased towards defense.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian began to display this top-notch supreme skill.

Airplanes!!!!

His body began to change, and countless black scales appeared on his body, as if wrapping him into a black sculpture, which was an eternal technique that imitated the creation of the ancient statue

Instantly, he threw a punch at himself

Bang!

The attack was bounced off without taking any damage.

"Such a powerful defense, if it is combined with the Gu Xia Statue, even if it is the Lord of Wuheng, don't think about creating me easily" Ye Tian muttered.

However, it is difficult for this top-notch supreme skill to increase much strength, but it is also very good, after all, there is also an ancient statue, and under the superposition of the two, Ye Tian's strength has increased more.

"This top-notch supreme technique is called the Gu Xia Battle Body!" Ye Tian said.

Having created this top-notch supreme skill, although Ye Tian's strength was not as good as that of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, it had at least shortened the distance.

Basically, he had some hope of escaping from a pinnacle Legendary Realm lord.

And he's getting closer to controlling the space.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to stay in retreat like this, but this day, a piece of news made him unable to sit still.

He had been looking for a race with a legendary spatial ancestor, and even placed this task in the Time Merchant House

And just now, the Time Firm told him that someone had taken over the task.

"Take a trip to the Time Comptoir!"

Ye Tian leapfrogged step by step and came to the branch of the Infinite Sea Time Commercial Bank.

The Xinyang Lord of the Time Merchant House came to see Ye Tian for the first time, after all, Ye Tian is too famous now, even if he didn't come to buy items, he also came to entertain Ye Tian in person.

"I've seen the Endless Lord. "

Lord Xinyang said politely.

"Lord Xinyang, I ordered a bounty task, and someone took it, so I came to take a look. "

Ye Tian said.

Xinyang hurriedly said167: Luan Endless Lord, go, I'll take you there, that legendary lord is in another branch of the Time Firm. "

"It's hard work!"

Ye Tian arched his hand.

Soon, Lord Xinyang took Ye Tian to the branch of the Time Trading Bank in Takizawahai.

At this time, Ye Tian met the legendary lord of the transcendent realm, the Silver Leaf Lord, who had taken over this task.

When the Silver Leaf Lord saw Ye Tian, he immediately said respectfully, "I've seen the Endless Lord. "

At this point, everyone else was gone, and only the two of them were left.

"Tell me, where is the race you discovered that contains the legendary spatial ancestor?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Silver Leaf Lord hurriedly said, "In this position." "

He said the specific coordinates, and then said, "This is a very ancient race, called the Sky Clan, I accidentally discovered that almost all of this race has a legendary-level space ancestor, and this race has a legendary realm lord, which is very low-key, and my doppelganger was killed directly." It just so happened that I saw the Endless Lord's bounty quest and immediately took it. "

"Okay, you'll be rewarded, but if you deceive me, you should know how to deceive a Legendary Realm Lord. Ye Tian said.

"Don't dare. "

The Silver Leaf Lord said immediately.

Soon, Ye Tian gave him 30 billion time coins, and then left this time firm. _
